Ignobility is the state of being afflicted by the [[Nine Plagues]], or of [[shuttering]]. It contrasts with [[Nobility]] which is liberation from the seven plagues

Someone in a state of nobility can [[trip]] and fall out of their state of Nobility. 

When this happens someone must undergo [[rehabilitation]], particularly [[secondary rehabilitation]] to get back into their state of nobility.

Someone in a state of ignobility is considered partially [[shuttered]], but they are not completely shuttered, as at that point they would be dead.
[[Category:Nobility]]
[[Category:Lambda Covenant]]
[[sn:Ignobility]][[Category:Lambda]]
[[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Ignobility]]
[[Category:Pages]]
